Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records To Canedo'S Iron Works
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Milan Holdorf's Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records To Canedo's Iron Works is granted. No opposition has been filed. Third party Canedo's Iron Works is ordered to produce records within 15 days of notice of this order. Third party Canedo's Iron Works' failure to produce documents was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Third party Canedo's Iron Works in the amount of $525, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-30-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
